title: Chubby Cat with Flowers
prompt: A cute chubby furry cat holds a bouquet of white daisies and small yellow wildflowers, holds the flowers towards the camera, and stands on lush green grass. The chubby cat smiles at the camera. The composition is focused on the lower third of the picture, with rolling emerald green hills extending to snow-capped mountains in the distance, under a cloud-dappled blue sky, bathed in golden morning light, fresh, soft focus and airy atmosphere. --ar 9:16 --v 7 --profile xsjswqa
